title: Deserialization RCE in py-lib < 3.0.1
description: py-lib below 3.0.1 deserializes untrusted input, allowing remote code execution. The project pins 2.9.0.
recommendation: Upgrade py-lib to >=3.0.1 and run the test suite.

title: B608 possible SQL injection via string-built query
description: A query is assembled with string formatting that includes user-controlled input.
recommendation: Use parameterised queries; never interpolate user input into SQL.

title: Chart export raises on an empty DataFrame instead of returning a 400
description: Exporting a chart whose query yields no rows raises an unhandled exception. It should fail gracefully with a 400 and a clear message.
recommendation: Guard the empty-frame case and return a 400 with a clear message.

title: Integration tests skipped and never run in CI
description: A block of database-engine integration tests is marked skip with no reason and is not exercised by CI, so regressions there go undetected.
recommendation: Determine whether the tests are still valid; re-enable or remove with justification.
